commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e1ae37b425fe72cf7b75f0d981d90e07824fb1d8)
commands.review_summary:
This PR splits subagent model selection from timeout-capable tool/media model config, removes stale `tools.subagents.model` references, and preserves spawned subagent fallback precedence with focused tests/docs updates.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main accepts `timeoutMs` through `agents.defaults.subagents.model` but rejects it through `agents.list[].subagents.model`; I did not execute parser tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The protected maintainer label, merge conflicts, and compatibility/upgrade decision make this a human review item rather than a safe automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(config): share subagent model schema
target.body:
Fixes #83291

Summary:
- Keep agent and subagent model config focused on model selection: `primary` and `fallbacks` only.
- Reject `timeoutMs` consistently for `agents.defaults.model`, `agents.defaults.subagents.model`, `agents.list[].model`, and `agents.list[].subagents.model` instead of adding another timeout knob.
- Add `openclaw doctor --fix` cleanup for shipped accidental agent-model `timeoutMs` keys while preserving media/tool model timeout config.
- Remove stale `tools.subagents.model` handling from schema, type metadata, doctor/model-ref helpers, pricing refs, docs, and generated config metadata.
- Preserve spawned subagent fallback behavior: child sessions still use subagent fallback precedence for auto-selected child models.

Verification:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/config/io.write-prepare.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent.model-formatting.test.ts src/agents/agent-scope.test.ts src/agents/model-selection.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-utils.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/codex-route-warnings.test.ts src/agents/openclaw-tools.subagents.sessions-spawn.model.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/migrate-hermes/model.plan.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/legacy-config-migrate.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/legacy-config-migrate.validation.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/model-pricing-cache.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/legacy-config-migrate.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/legacy-config-migrate.validation.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts extensions/migrate-hermes/model.plan.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json extensions/migrate-hermes/model.plan.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/commands/doctor/shared/legacy-config-migrate.test.ts`
- `pnpm config:docs:check`
- `pnpm docs:check-mdx`
- `git diff --check`
- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/codex-review/scripts/codex-review --mode branch`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --blacksmith-org openclaw --blacksmith-workflow .github/workflows/ci-check-testbox.yml --blacksmith-job check --blacksmith-ref main --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json -- CI=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 OPENCLAW_TEST_PROJECTS_PARALLEL=6 OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=900000 OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=1 OPENCLAW_TESTBOX_REMOTE_RUN=1 pnpm check:changed` (Testbox `tbx_01krwtqwkps1j80egnecme8b9x`, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26016348500)

Behavior addressed: subagent and normal agent model config no longer accept `timeoutMs`; accepted shape stays `primary` and `fallbacks` only.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout plus Blacksmith Testbox changed-file gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused Vitest commands above, targeted lint, generated config/docs checks, diff check, Codex review, and Testbox `pnpm check:changed`.
Evidence after fix: focused original tests passed (11 files, 532 tests); doctor/Hermes migration tests passed; gateway pricing/doctor/schema focused tests passed (7 files, 145 tests); targeted lint passed; config docs check passed; MDX docs check passed; diff check passed; changed-file Testbox gate passed across core/coreTests/extensions/extensionTests/docs; Codex review clean.
Observed result after fix: dead agent-model `timeoutMs` keys are rejected and doctor removes shipped stale config; real media/tool model `timeoutMs` remains valid; `tools.subagents.model` is no longer schema/type/doc supported; spawned subagent fallbacks still follow child model selection precedence.
What was not tested: live external model provider calls.
target.author: steipete
